hooks.command: $root=(git rev-parse --show-toplevel).Trim(); $tree=(git rev-parse HEAD:backend/python-ai 2>$null); if(-not $tree){exit 0}; $tree=$tree.Trim(); $marker=Join-Path $root '.git/fly-python-ai-deployed'; $last=if(Test-Path $marker){(Get-Content $marker -Raw).Trim()}else{''}; if($tree -ne $last){ flyctl deploy (Join-Path $root 'backend/python-ai'); if($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0){ Set-Content -Path $marker -Value $tree -NoNewline } }
